name: com.dmzagent/skill-builder-mcp
description: Search the skill-builder registry and auto-install skills for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.

environmentVariables.name: SKILL_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Registry API base URL (defaults to https://skills.dmzagent.com/api).

environmentVariables.name: SKILL_PROJECT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Default project root that installs write into (defaults to the working directory).

environmentVariables.name: SKILL_TARGET
environmentVariables.description: Force install target: claude | codex | cursor | file (auto-detected by default).
